name: Sauteed Scallops W/Feta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add the butter.
2. Add the onion, green peppers, and jalapeno peppers to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the sea scallops to the skillet and cook until they are heated through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
4. Pour in the white wine and stir gently. Cover the skillet and steam for 45 seconds.
5. Sprinkle the mozzarella and feta cheese over the top of the dish.
6. Add the garlic, salt, and chili powder to taste.
7. Allow the dish to simmer until the cheeses have melted completely.
8. Serve over rice. Serves 2.
Source: The Flying Burrito, Chapel Hill, NC
